title: helichrysum arenarium subsp. rubicundum
intro: Helichrysum arenarium subsp. rubicundum, also known as the yellow mountain curlip, is a perennial plant species within the sunflower family that is native to Europe, particularly in mountainous regions. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its essential oil rich in sesquiterpenes. The health benefits of Helichrysum arenarium subsp. rubicundum include its ability to reduce pain, inflammation, and oxidative stress, making it a potential treatment for various conditions, such as arthritis and wounds. Herbal preparations of this plant, including essential oils and infusions, can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
